title: citrus combara var. boholensis
intro: Citrus combara var. boholensis, also known as the Bohol citrus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and edible fruits. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Citrus combara var. boholensis include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional cooking and as a garnish in various dishes.
